content: I was attending a virtual board meeting for my client, NexaPay, from 7:15 PM to 9:00 PM on March 17. My Zoom session was recorded. I was in my home office, wearing a formal blouse, with my laptop on the desk. I had a glass of water beside me. I never left the room. I didn’t know my husband had taken the car. I only found out when the police called me at 9:30 PM. I had no idea the headlight was damaged. I had my car serviced on March 10, and it was fine. I filed an insurance claim on March 19 because I noticed the damage then — I thought it was from a minor scrape. I had no motive to harm Mr. Mehta. I barely knew him.
